heading: Tuesday Night
text: Periods of clouds. Scattered showers and thunderstorms. Lows from the mid 60s to lower 70s. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph and diminishing.

heading: Wednesday
text: Partly cloudy. Scattered showers and potentially severe thunderstorms, mainly after noon. Highs from the upper 80s to mid 90s. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Variable clouds. Chance of an evening thunderstorm, especially northeast; severe storms possible. Lows from the upper 60s to mid 70s. Winds diminishing to light and variable.
